title: Clinical priority bands and escalation
content:
## Priority bands (0–100 score)

| Band | Score | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Emergency | ≥ 90 | Escalate to 111/999 — **never book** |
| Urgent | ≥ 70 | Same/next-day slot; reserved pool eligible |
| Soon | ≥ 50 | Within 1–2 weeks |
| Routine | ≥ 25 | Standard wait |
| Admin | < 25 | Telephone/eConsult where possible |

## Components
Score = 100 × (0.50×clinical_urgency + 0.20×wait_time + 0.15×vulnerability + 0.15×access_burden).

Every assessment must include a one-line plain-English rationale. Red-flag symptoms map to clinical_urgency 1.0.
